name: Synthetic Service Agreement fixture
description: Wholly synthetic vendor service agreement scenario for end-to-end Alpha v0.1 evaluation (Milestone 4C). Counterparty uses the IANA example.test domain; amounts, dates, and party names are obviously invented. No real client / counterparty / BOF facts. This file is loaded by the alpha-evaluation runner (scripts/run-alpha-evaluation.ts) and MUST NOT be used to seed real workflows.
project_name: Synthetic Service Agreement — vendor integration Q2

intake_answers.scope: Synthetic data-pipeline integration: ingestion connectors, scheduled exports, monitoring dashboards.
intake_answers.payment_schedule: 30% on signing, 40% on milestone 1 acceptance, 30% on final acceptance
intake_answers.sla: 99.5% monthly availability target; 4-hour incident response window during business hours

source_contents.synthetic_service_sow.pdf:
SCOPE OF WORK (synthetic test fixture).

Vendor: Example Test Vendor, Ltd. (example.test domain).
Client: Synthetic In-house Team.
Services: data-pipeline integration — three connectors, scheduled hourly exports, monitoring dashboard, on-call rotation during business hours.
Milestone 1: connector delivery + UAT (2027-09-30).
Milestone 2: dashboard delivery + UAT (2027-12-31).
Final acceptance: 2028-03-31.
Fee: 48,000,000 KRW (VAT excluded). 30% on signing; 40% on M1 acceptance; 30% on final acceptance.
Term: 2027-07-01 to 2028-06-30, with 12-month maintenance option.
SLA: 99.5% monthly uptime, 4-hour incident response (business hours), 24-hour resolution for P1.
IP: deliverables transferred to client on payment; vendor retains pre-existing IP and reusable libraries.
Termination for convenience: 60-day notice with pro-rata refund.
(Synthetic fixture; no real-world facts.)
source_contents.synthetic_service_quote.xlsx:
Synthetic quote.
Line item 1: 3 × ingestion connector @ 8,000,000 KRW = 24,000,000 KRW.
Line item 2: monitoring dashboard build = 16,000,000 KRW.
Line item 3: 12-month maintenance retainer (optional) = 8,000,000 KRW.
Subtotal (with maintenance): 48,000,000 KRW (VAT excluded).
Payment terms: 30% signing, 40% M1 acceptance, 30% final acceptance.
(Synthetic fixture.)
source_contents.synthetic_service_vendor_intro.eml:
From: vendor@synthetic.example.test
Subject: Service agreement — initial draft

Hi,

Following our scoping call, please share the standard service agreement template. We are aligned on the SOW + quote and would like to start UAT in September. Looking forward to receiving the draft.

Thanks,
Synthetic Vendor
(Synthetic fixture — no real sender.)

issue_decisions.partial_note: Acceptable if SLA penalty cap raised to 15% of monthly fees
